title: Ardhangini
desc: Suman's accident forces his wife and ex-wife to face off in an uncomfortable emotional showdown. Drama ensues.

title: Agni
desc: Terrorists targeting an honest cop accidentally kill schoolchildren.

title: DJ
desc: Jagannatham Sastry, a benevolent young man, tries his best to help people in need wheneveran opportunity comes up.

title: Flat No. 609
desc: A couple start experiencing bizzare, paranormal activities at their new flat in Kolkata.

title: Chaamp
desc: Shibaji, a famous Indian boxer, tries to revive his career after a tragic accident.

title: Arundhati
desc: During a visit to her native place, Arundhati learns that she looks like her great-grandmother, Jejamma. Soon, Jejamma's battles become her own as she fights a black magician who wants to kill her.

title: Cockpit
desc: Captain Dibyendu Rakshit must land an aircraft that has been damaged due to turbulence.

title: Hari Pada Bandwala
desc: Haripada, a common man, is kidnapped by a powerful man and forced to pretend as the latter's girlfriend Sweety's lover.

title: Honeymoon
desc: Gitin goes on a late honeymoon with his wife, Jayanti, but sadly bumps into his employer.

title: Herogiri
desc: Shuvo is content being single. When his friend tells him about a girl and her father who are cheating naive men, he decides to teach them a lesson.

title: Krishnakanter Will
desc: Haralal commits forgery to get a bigger share of his father's property.

title: Raavan (2022)
desc: Ram, who spreads positivity and happiness fights against Raavan, an evil man who ruthlessly ends the lives of many individuals.

title: Jawker Dhan
desc: Two friends set out on a treasure hunt after solving a puzzle etched on a human skull.

title: Ardhangini
desc: Shubhra and Meghna face emotional turmoil when Suman suffers an accident.

title: Villain
desc: An honest man sets out to exact revenge after he is framed, and his wife is murdered.

title: Jamaibabu Zindabad
desc: Kajol and Sagar are always at loggerheads, but a series of events change their equation.

title: Tobu Aporichito
desc: A married couple who start on the wrong side and detest each other eventually grow close and learn to appreciate and love each other.

title: One
desc: An aspiring policeman conducts an informal investigation against a devious scientist.

title: Sangarsha
desc: Bijay, an orphan, is provided shelter by Dev after he saves his life. When Dev dies, Bijay takes over his business. However, he faces oppression from Janardan, Dev's former employee.

title: Ballavpur Er Roopkatha
desc: While trying to sell his palace, Bhupati Ray's ancestor's ghost becomes a chaotic hurdle.

title: Chaya O Chobi
desc: Chaos ensues when an actress mysteriously disappears from an ongoing shooting of her film.

title: Love Express
desc: Laal misses his train so ends up spending the night on a platform. His life changes when he meet Nilasha and accompanies her through the journey.

title: Black Coffee
desc: A director torn between his wife and his mistress tries to find solace in his creativity.

title: Mon Mane Na
desc: To escape an arranged marriage, Ria runs away to meet her boyfriend. Her feelings get complicated when she gets to know Rahul, a fellow traveler with a secret.

title: Ghare and Baire
desc: Amit decides to confess his love to Labonya when she agrees to get married to an NRI.

title: Pathbhola
desc: Five rebellious men working for a corrupt businessman kill a police officer, setting off a life-altering chain of events as they discover a shocking truth.

title: Jyeshthoputro
desc: Indrajit, a popular actor, goes home after his father's sudden death, and hidden secrets emerge.

title: Sriman Boothnath
desc: Bhootnath is an uneducated man but a good human being. Impressed, Binoy hires him. However, Binoy's daughter tries several ways to get him fired.

title: Belashuru
desc: A family's bond strengthens while tending to a member diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease.

title: Bagha Jatin
desc: Jatindranath Mukherjee, transformed into Bagha Jatin, fiercely fought for India's freedom.

title: Mondo Basar Galpo
desc: Filmmaker Ahana Sen struggles with personal trauma, finding solace and support from psychiatrist friend Sayantan.

title: Asookh
desc: Sudhamoy relies on his daughter for income and faces a major change when his wife becomes ill and is hospitalized.

title: Ballavpur Er Roopkatha
desc: Bhupati Ray tries to sell his haunted palace to pay off his debt, but a family ghost causes trouble when he finds a potential buyer.

title: Bony
desc: A couple's newborn son has some special powers. An America-born Bangladeshi on the run scientist, framed by the government with suspected links to terrorism, is looking for the couple and their newborn.

title: Voice Of The Nation
desc: Experts and journalists debate major national issues while presenting strong opinions and diverse viewpoints.

title: Tarakar Mrityu
desc: A couple's vacation in Kalimpong takes a spooky turn when they check into a haunted bungalow, leading them to experience strange happenings and unravel a chilling murder mystery.
